name: Asteroids
description: Asteroids is a single-player space shooter where the player controls a spaceship navigating an asteroid field. The objective is to destroy asteroids and enemy saucers while avoiding collisions. The game begins with a set number of asteroids of varying sizes. When a large asteroid is destroyed, it splits into multiple medium asteroids. When a medium asteroid is destroyed, it splits into multiple small asteroids. Small asteroids are destroyed outright. The player's ship has limited mobility; it can rotate left and right, thrust forward, and fire projectiles. Projectiles travel in a straight line until they exit the screen or collide with an asteroid or saucer. The player has a limited number of lives. If the ship collides with an asteroid or is hit by an enemy saucer projectile, the player loses a life. The game ends when the player runs out of lives. Periodically, two types of enemy saucers appear: a large saucer that fires less accurately but more frequently, and a small saucer that fires more accurately but less frequently. The player earns points for destroying asteroids and saucers. The game increases in difficulty over time as more asteroids are introduced and the saucers appear more often.

controls.shift: Hyperspace (teleport to a random location on the screen)
